title: ipomoea carolina
intro: Ipomoea carolina, also known as the Carolina morning-glory, is a perennial flowering vine native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ipomoea carolina include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea carolina often include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
